channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: A manhole cover on the road has missing edges and makes loud noise as cars drive over it with the danger of it falling into the manhole, 21st June
item.description:
A manhole cover is moving and makes loud noise as cars drive over it. The edge of the manhole cover is broken posing a risk of the cover or the entire manhole falling in creating a large hole on the road posing danger to people, vehicles falling in.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lyndon Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car debris in road, 21st June
item.description:
Looks like there has been an accident and part of a car bumper and related debris is on the roundabout
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beckton Roundabout, Beckton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 21st June
item.description:
It has been sitting in this parking space since March 2026 with no movement and racking up parking tickets. The street is already lacking parking so would be good if removed

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Invermore Place, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loads of black bags and shoes, 21st June
item.description:
Rubbish bags, clothes and shoes dumped on the street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Alvey Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped rubbish Selborne Road for removal please, 21st June
item.description:
Flytipped general rubbish for removal please. Thank you!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Selborne Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken dog bin, 21st June
item.description:
First entry into 5 Arches the dog litter bin has been vandalised. Been like this for nearly a week now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rectory Lane, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped chairs, 21st June
item.description:
Flytipped chairs in Selborne Road for removal please. Thank you!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Selborne Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pavement Slab poorly fixed, 21st June
item.description:
A broken pavement slab has been poorly fixed with excess cement left behind Need proper finishing and clean up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 125, Pomeroy Street, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown brambles on pavements, 21st June
item.description:
Brambles are taking over the pavement making it very difficult to walk on pavement. Rectory Lane is a very busy road usually full of cars on the school run not counting the amount of speeding cars. So there is a problem with walking out on the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 167, Rectory Lane, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped rubbish, 21st June
item.description:
Please clear asap as it impedes the pavement, buggies and wheelchairs. Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several bushes overhanging pavement, 21st June
item.description:
There are several bushes along oakfield road which are significantly blocking the pavement. I am a wheelchair user so wasn’t going to get my phone out to note each one - but they have gotten out of hand and desperately need cutting back
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): unit 1, Limes Avenue, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bins, 21st June
item.description:
Bins are overflowing at the bottom of Walsingham Walk. Bins needs emptying as soon as possible otherwise rubbish will be all over the street again. Bins are that full people are now placing their rubbish bags on top of the bins forming a tower. This is a hazard as these bags could fall on to a person/child as they walk past.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Matfield Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree overhanging road - blocking crossing visibility, 21st June
item.description:
The lower parts of the trees opposite and down from the crossing outside of Asda express are getting very bushy and spilling out onto the main road. As a wheelchair user this totally blocked my visibility crossing here (and drivers’ visibility of me). Given that this is right next to a primary school this needs to be fixed rather urgently before someone is hurt
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 107-111, Anerley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Alma Birk house, Cavendish Road, 21st June
item.description:
Sofa and cardboard boxes dumped on pavement overnight Friday 19th June 2026

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cavendish Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Hedges overgrowing onto pavement, 21st June
item.description:
Hedges and other vegetation need trimming back. They are causing a trip hazard across the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Kingfisher Close, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping bulky waste, 21st June
item.description:
Mattress, wooden drawers and other small objects have been fly tipped. This is a notorious fly tipping area, it would be great to have a CCTV camera nearby to deter fly tippers

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marlow Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 45 Tennyson Road, 21st June
item.description:
Fly tipping: couch and mattress

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glengall Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Approx 10 bikes blocking pavement, 21st June
item.description:
Approx 10 lime bikes blocking pavement on bugsby’s way opposite McDonald’s on other side of road beside the bus stop

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bugsbys Way, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive litter on bugsby’s way under bridge, 21st June
item.description:
For months now the below fly tip has been abandoned here. Computer monitor with wooden plank Excessive litter on side of the pavements An abandoned and damaged old banner still hung on metal rails between road and pavement. Clothing, bags and trash on both sides of the higher elevated side of the pavement.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bugsbys Way, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Neighbour left boxes in communal alleyway, 21st June
item.description:
It has been here for weeks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sheringham Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
